mapper.insert: insert into tbl_mention (mention_tagger_id, mention_tagged_id, post_id) values (#{mentionTaggerId}, #{mentionTaggedId}, #{postId})
mapper.select: select m.id as mentionTaggedId, m.member_name as memberName, m.member_handle as memberHandle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as profileFileName, bg.badge_type as badgeType from tbl_member m left join tbl_badge bg on bg.member_id = m.id where m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and lower(m.member_handle) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId} and blocked_id = m.id) or (blocker_id = m.id and blocked_id = #{memberId}) ) order by m.member_handle limit 10
